howToGet: Obtain Rathalos eggs from Tarkuan habitat dens
Release Rathalos into a habitat and begin Habitat Restoration
Reach Rank A in the Rathalos ecosystem
Azure Rathalos eggs will appear in that habitat's Retreat Den
mutations.notes: Mid-chain mutation. Unlocked by reaching Rank A in Rathalos habitat restoration. Both dragon and thunder become strong weaknesses.

howToGet: Obtain Rathalos eggs from Tarkuan habitat dens
Release Rathalos into a habitat and begin Habitat Restoration
Reach High Rank in the Rathalos ecosystem
Silver Rathalos eggs become available in the habitat den
mutations.notes: Rare High Rank mutation of Rathalos. Dramatically increased stats and new silver coloring.

howToGet: Obtain Rathalos eggs from Tarkuan habitat dens
Release Rathalos into a habitat and begin Habitat Restoration
Ensure the habitat contains 4 or more different Flying Wyvern species
Reach Rank S in the Rathalos ecosystem
Dreadking Rathalos eggs will appear once all conditions are met

habitatConditions: 4+ Flying Wyvern species in same habitat

mutations.notes: Deviant mutation of Rathalos. Requires a Flying Wyvern-rich habitat to unlock. One of the strongest fire-element monsties.

howToGet: Obtain Rathian eggs from Azuria habitat dens (Sunpetal Plains)
Release Rathian into a habitat and begin Habitat Restoration
Reach Rank B in the Rathian ecosystem
Pink Rathian eggs will appear in that habitat's den
mutations.notes: First step in the Rathian mutation chain. Rank B is the earliest ecosystem milestone, making this an accessible early upgrade.

howToGet: Complete the Pink Rathian mutation step first (Rank B habitat)
Continue restoring the Rathian habitat — aim for Sunpetal Plains
Ensure 3 or more Poisonous Monsters are present in the same habitat
Reach Rank S in the Rathian ecosystem
Dreadqueen Rathian eggs will appear once all conditions are met

habitatConditions: 3+ Poisonous Monsters in the same habitat
progression: Pink Rathian mutation must be unlocked first

mutations.notes: Deviant mutation at the end of the Rathian chain. Requires a poison-focused habitat. Very powerful final form with high HP and ATK.

howToGet: Obtain Zinogre eggs (repel Invasive Odogaron to unlock Retreat Den)
Release Zinogre into a habitat and begin Habitat Restoration
Reach Rank A in the Zinogre ecosystem
Stygian Zinogre eggs will appear in that habitat's den

progression: Zinogre must be unlocked via Odogaron invasion first

mutations.notes: Mid-chain mutation of Zinogre. Switches from thunder to dragon element. Required step to reach Thunderlord Zinogre.

howToGet: Unlock and obtain Zinogre and Stygian Zinogre first
Continue restoring the Zinogre habitat to Rank S
Reach Rank S in the Zinogre ecosystem
Thunderlord Zinogre eggs will appear in the Retreat Den

progression: Stygian Zinogre mutation must be unlocked first

mutations.notes: Deviant mutation at the end of the Zinogre chain. Exceptional ATK stat of 10. One of the strongest thunder-type monsties available.

howToGet: Obtain Astalos eggs (force Invasive Seregios to retreat to unlock Retreat Den)
Release Astalos into a habitat and begin Habitat Restoration
Ensure the habitat contains 3 or more Lightning-type Monsters
Reach Rank S in the Astalos ecosystem
Boltreaver Astalos eggs will appear once all conditions are met

progression: Astalos must be unlocked via Seregios invasion first

mutations.notes: Deviant Astalos — jumps directly to Rank S (no mid-chain mutation). Requires lightning-rich habitat. Excellent ATK and SPD combo.

howToGet: Obtain Lagiacrus eggs — force Invasive Plesioth to retreat from Mirror Lake
Navigate the hidden cave (swim north through narrow channel from Catavan Stand island)
Release Lagiacrus into a habitat and begin Habitat Restoration
Reach Rank A in the Lagiacrus ecosystem
Ivory Lagiacrus eggs will appear in that habitat's den

progression: Lagiacrus requires navigating a hidden cave in Mirror Lake

mutations.notes: Subspecies/mutation of Lagiacrus obtained at Rank A. Switches from thunder to ice element. Notable for its hidden unlock location.

howToGet: Obtain Barioth eggs from Serathis Glacial Caps (repel Invasive Khezu to unlock Retreat Den)
Release Barioth into a habitat and begin Habitat Restoration
Reach Rank S in the Barioth ecosystem
Sand Barioth eggs will appear in that habitat's den

progression: Barioth must be unlocked via Khezu invasion first

mutations.notes: High-speed subspecies mutation of Barioth. Excellent SPD and DEF stats at 8 each. Switches from ice to neutral element.

howToGet: Obtain Tigrex eggs from Canalta Timberland (repel Invasive Diablos to unlock Retreat Den)
Release Tigrex into a habitat and begin Habitat Restoration
Reach Rank A in the Tigrex ecosystem
Brute Tigrex eggs will appear in that habitat's den

progression: Tigrex must be unlocked via Diablos invasion first

mutations.notes: Mid-chain mutation with greatly boosted ATK. Required step to unlock Grimclaw Tigrex.

howToGet: Unlock Brute Tigrex first (Rank A Tigrex habitat)
Continue habitat restoration to Rank S
Ensure 4 Power-type Monsters each reach Rank S in the ecosystem
Reach Rank S in the Tigrex ecosystem with all conditions met
Grimclaw Tigrex eggs will appear once all Power-type conditions are fulfilled

habitatConditions: 4 Power-type Monsters must each reach Rank S in the habitat
progression: Brute Tigrex mutation must be unlocked first

mutations.notes: Deviant mutation at the end of the Tigrex chain. Requires four Power-type Monsters to all reach Rank S — the most demanding habitat condition of any mutation.

howToGet: Obtain Nargacuga eggs from Canalta Timberland (repel Invasive Nerscylla to unlock Retreat Den)
Release Nargacuga into a habitat and begin Habitat Restoration
Reach Rank A in the Nargacuga ecosystem
Green Nargacuga eggs will appear in that habitat's den

progression: Nargacuga must be unlocked via Nerscylla invasion first

mutations.notes: Mid-chain mutation of Nargacuga. Improved stats over base form. Required step to unlock Silverwind Nargacuga.

howToGet: Unlock Green Nargacuga first (Rank A Nargacuga habitat)
Continue habitat restoration to Rank S
Ensure 3 or more wind-focused Monsters are present in the same habitat
Reach Rank S in the Nargacuga ecosystem
Silverwind Nargacuga eggs will appear once all conditions are met

progression: Green Nargacuga mutation must be unlocked first

mutations.notes: Deviant mutation with extraordinary SPD and DEF scores of 10 each. The fastest monstie in its class. Ideal for speed-focused teams.

howToGet: Obtain Glavenus eggs from Canalta Timberland habitat dens
Release Glavenus into a habitat and begin Habitat Restoration
Reach Rank S in the Glavenus ecosystem — no special habitat conditions required
Hellblade Glavenus eggs will appear in that habitat's den
mutations.notes: Straightforward Rank S mutation with no special habitat requirements. One of the highest ATK monsties (10). Glass-cannon profile — low SPD and DEF offset by maximum ATK.

howToGet: Obtain Diablos eggs from Tarkuan Rococo Rocks
Release Diablos specifically into the Bountiful Dunes habitat in Tarkuan
Begin Habitat Restoration in Bountiful Dunes — this specific location is required
Reach Rank S in the Diablos ecosystem within Bountiful Dunes
Bloodbath Diablos eggs will appear once all conditions are met

habitatConditions: Must be restored in Bountiful Dunes habitat specifically
progression: Tarkuan Bountiful Dunes region access required

mutations.notes: Location-locked mutation — MUST be unlocked in Bountiful Dunes. Exceptional HP (9) and ATK (10) combination makes this one of the most powerful monsties in the game.

howToGet: Obtain Mizutsune eggs (repel Invasive Shogun Ceanataur to unlock Retreat Den)
Obtain Zinogre eggs (required co-inhabitant)
Release BOTH Mizutsune AND Zinogre into the same habitat
Perform Habitat Restoration until both species reach Rank S in that shared habitat
Soulseer Mizutsune eggs will appear once both conditions are simultaneously met

requirements.ecosystemRank: Rank S (for both Mizutsune and Zinogre)
habitatConditions: Zinogre must be present in the same habitat at Rank S
progression: Both Mizutsune and Zinogre must be unlocked and placed in same habitat

mutations.notes: Unique dual-species unlock — the only mutation requiring a second monster species (Zinogre) to also reach Rank S in the same habitat. Most complex unlock condition in the game.
